ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size (e.g., Extra Small, Small, Medium, Large, Extra Large) */,
  "size_chart_url" TEXT /* URL to a size chart image or PDF for the size */,
  "size_fit" TEXT /* Description of the fit (e.g., Slim fit, Regular fit, Loose fit) */,
  "size_chart_text" TEXT /* Text description of the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., US, UK, AUS/NZ) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code of the region (e.g., US, UK, AUS/NZ) */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region and its sizing standards */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the currency used in the region */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the primary language used in the region */,
  "measurement_system" TEXT /* Type of measurement system used (e.g., Imperial, Metric) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "conversion_value" INTEGER /* Conversion value of the size in the specified region */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category for which the conversion applies */,
  "conversion_chart_url" TEXT /* URL to a conversion chart image or PDF */,
  "conversion_chart_text" TEXT /* Text description of the conversion chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses, Outerwear) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  "category_fit_guide_url" TEXT /* URL to a fit guide for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the item belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand that manufactures the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the clothing item */,
  "item_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the item */,
  "size_chart_url" TEXT /* URL to a size chart specific to the item */,
  "item_fit_guide_url" TEXT /* URL to a fit guide specific to the item */,
  "item_description_long" TEXT /* Long description of the item */,
  "item_material" TEXT /* Material(s) the item is made of */,
  "item_care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the brand */,
  "brand_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  "brand_fit_guide_url" TEXT /* URL to a fit guide provided by the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "fit_accuracy" TEXT /* How accurately the size fits (e.g., Too small, Perfect, Too large) */,
  "fit_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the fit */,
  "delivery_satisfaction" INTEGER /* Satisfaction level with delivery (1-5) */,
  "delivery_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the delivery experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's preferred region */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user (e.g., en, fr, es) */,
  "user_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user (e.g., Male, Female, Other) */,
  "user_height" INTEGER /* Height of the user in centimeters */,
  "user_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  "user_body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the user (e.g., Slim, Athletic, Curvy) */,
  "user_birth_year" INTEGER /* Birth year of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
